title: RBI (Commercial Banks – Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Fifth Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
The amended directions permit commercial banks to recognize current year profits for CRAR calculations on a quarterly basis. RBI also prescribed audit and limited review requirements for such recognition.
The post RBI (Commercial Banks – Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Fifth Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
